summary: Cardology Magi Formula fix verified. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend displays Robert Lee Camp attribution and Magi Formula with solar value correctly. Fixed a bug where Joker card was returning 'Jack' instead of 'Joker' for the value field.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed get_card_details function to handle Joker case properly)
seed_data_creation: None required - cardology calculations are algorithmic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cardology Magi Formula implementation verified. The formula is: Solar Value = 55 - (2 * month + day). SV 0 = Joker, SV 1-13 = Hearts, SV 14-26 = Clubs, SV 27-39 = Diamonds, SV 40-52 = Spades. Fixed bug in get_card_details() where Joker was returning 'Jack' as value.

api_response_fields.magi_formula: Present in response with formula string ✓

features_verified.compatibility_endpoint: Returns score and card details for two dates ✓
features_verified.frontend_magi_formula_display: Shows formula and solar value in result ✓

frontend_ui_tested: Birth Card tab shows month/day dropdowns
Jan 1 calculation shows King of Spades with Magi Formula section
Magi Formula section shows '55 - (2 x 1 + 1) = 52' and 'Solar Value: 52'
Jul 4 calculation shows Jack of Diamonds
Daily Card tab reveals a card with element, planet, suit info
Love Match tab shows compatibility form for two people
Compatibility result shows score percentage and both cards

bug_fixed.issue: Joker card was returning 'Jack' as value instead of 'Joker'
bug_fixed.root_cause: get_card_details() function was parsing 'JK' code incorrectly - val_str='J' mapped to 11 (Jack)
bug_fixed.fix: Added explicit check for code=='JK' at start of get_card_details() to return proper Joker card details
